name: Rokets!
description:
Rokets! is an assault rifle that launches small rockets, consuming 3 AR rounds per shot. The rockets drift unpredictably at low speed and detonate on contact with enemies or terrain.

Each blast deals 100 percent of the weapon's listed gun damage as splash in a small radius, with no extra direct-hit impact damage. Splash, grenade and rocket launcher damage bonuses do not boost this explosion, but general gun damage bonuses do. The Torgue barrel trades fire rate and reload speed for higher damage, more recoil and a larger magazine.
notes:
Drops randomly from suitable loot sources.
Cannot spawn at white rarity.
If it rolls without an accessory or elemental capacitor, it uses the prefix Rockit rather than the usual grip-based prefix.
Its detonating rockets can be absorbed by Absorb Shields and converted into rocket launcher ammo (not AR ammo).
Blue and purple versions have extremely slow reload times.
Projectiles count as rockets, so Krieg's Blood Overdrive cannot be triggered, even on direct hits.
